zh.lifeSummary: Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill是Sir Alexander 3rd Laird Of Stitchill Gordon Of Stitchill和Mrs Alexander Gordon的兒子，於1400年出生在法國奧維豪-洛易巴斯。他於1420年之前與Annabella Drummond結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1445年在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill是Sir Alexander 3rd Laird Of Stitchill Gordon Of Stitchill和Mrs Alexander Gordon的儿子，于1400年出生在法国奧維豪-洛易巴斯。他于1420年之前与Annabella Drummond结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1445年在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫特享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill was born in 1400, in Bas, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, France as the son of Sir Alexander 3rd Laird Of Stitchill Gordon Of Stitchill and Mrs Alexander Gordon. He married Annabella Drummond before 1420. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1445, in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill est né en 1400, à Bas, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, France, fils de Sir Alexander 3rd Laird Of Stitchill Gordon Of Stitchill et Mrs Alexander Gordon. Il a épousé Annabella Drummond avant 1420. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1445, à Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill wurde 1400 in Bas, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, Frankreich, als Sohn von Sir Alexander 3rd Laird Of Stitchill Gordon Of Stitchill und Mrs Alexander Gordon geboren. Er hat vor 1420 Annabella Drummond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1445 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill è nato il nel 1400 nel Bas, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, Francia come figlio di Sir Alexander 3rd Laird Of Stitchill Gordon Of Stitchill e Mrs Alexander Gordon. Lui sposato Annabella Drummond prima del 1420. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1445, nel Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchillは1400年にフランスアウバーグンハウテ-ロイアーバスでSir Alexander 3rd Laird Of Stitchill Gordon Of StitchillとMrs Alexander Gordonの息子として生まれた。1420年以前にAnnabella Drummondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1445年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエントで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill(은)는 1400년 프랑스 오버그니 하테-로이르 바스에서 Sir Alexander 3rd Laird Of Stitchill Gordon Of Stitchill(와)과 Mrs Alexander Gordon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1420년 이전 Annabella Drummond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1445년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처트에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill nasceu em 1400, em Bas, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, França filho de Sir Alexander 3rd Laird Of Stitchill Gordon Of Stitchill e Mrs Alexander Gordon. Ele casou-se com Annabella Drummond antes 1420. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1445, em Charente, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill родился в 1400 г. в местности бас, хауте-лоир, аувиргн, Франция. Его родителей звали Sir Alexander 3rd Laird Of Stitchill Gordon Of Stitchill и Mrs Alexander Gordon. Он женился на женщине по имени Annabella Drummond перед 1420 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1445 г. в местности чарент, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill nació en 1400, en Bas, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, Francia como hijo de Sir Alexander 3rd Laird Of Stitchill Gordon Of Stitchill y Mrs Alexander Gordon. Se casó con Annabella Drummond antes de 1420. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1445, en Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 45 años.
